name: aether-syndicate
description: Aether Syndicate — FPS multijugador competitivo para navegador con gravedad dinámica.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w @aether/server" "npm run dev -w @aether/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @aether/client && npm run build -w @aether/server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @aether/shared && npm run typecheck -w @aether/server && npm run typecheck -w @aether/client
